zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract於1070年5月20日出生在英國爾哈爾頓時，他的父親Ilbert de Lacy 1st Baron of Pontefract25歲，母親Mary de Muritan29歲。他和Mathilde de Perche至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1129年在英國越可爾朋特福拉可特享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract于1070年5月20日出生在英国爾哈爾頓时，他的父亲Ilbert de Lacy 1st Baron of Pontefract25岁，母亲Mary de Muritan29岁。他和Mathilde de Perche至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1129年在英国越可爾朋特福拉可特享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract was born on 20 May 1070, in Halton, Cheshire, England, his father, Ilbert de Lacy 1st Baron of Pontefract, was 25 and his mother, Mary de Muritan, was 29. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Mathilde de Perche. He died in 1129, in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract est né le 20 mai 1070, à Halton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Ilbert de Lacy 1st Baron of Pontefract, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary de Muritan, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Mathilde de Perche. Il est décédé en 1129, à Pontefract, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract am 20. Mai 1070 in Halton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ilbert de Lacy 1st Baron of Pontefract 25 und seine Mutter Mary de Muritan 29. Er hatte mit Mathilde de Perche mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1129 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract è nato il il 20 maggio 1070 nel Halton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Ilbert de Lacy 1st Baron of Pontefract, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mary de Muritan, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Mathilde de Perche. Morì nel 1129, nel Pontefract, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefractが1070年5月20日にイギリスチェシュアイアハルトンで生まれた時，父Ilbert de Lacy 1st Baron of Pontefractは25歳，母Mary de Muritanは29歳であった。彼はMathilde de Percheとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1129年にイギリスヨークシュアイアポンテフラクトで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract(이)가 1070년 5월 20일 영국 체실르 할턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ilbert de Lacy 1st Baron of Pontefract(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Muritan(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Mathilde de Perche(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1129년 영국 요르크실르 폰테프라크트에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract nasceu em 20 de maio de 1070, em Halton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ilbert de Lacy 1st Baron of Pontefract, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Muritan, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Mathilde de Perche. Ele faleceu em 1129, em Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract родился 20 мая 1070 г. в местности хэлтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ilbert de Lacy 1st Baron of Pontefract было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Muritan, 29. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Mathilde de Perche. Он умер в 1129 г. в местности понтефракт, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract nació el 20 de mayo de 1070, en Halton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ilbert de Lacy 1st Baron of Pontefract, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mary de Muritan, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Mathilde de Perche. Murió en 1129, en Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
